**Total Templates**: 26

- **Planning a feature?** → Go to [Phase 1-7: Documentation](#phase-1-7-documentation--prd-generation)

---

## 📚 Consistency Standards (Shared Foundations)

**Foundation documents ensuring enterprise-grade consistency across all templates.**

| Document | Purpose | Required Reading |
|----------|---------|------------------|
| **[SYSTEM-STATUS-DEFINITIONS.md](SYSTEM-STATUS-DEFINITIONS.md)** | Single source of truth for workflow states (NOT_STARTED → IN_PROGRESS → IN_REVIEW → IMPLEMENTED → DELIVERED) and approval statuses (PENDING → REVIEWING → APPROVED/CONDITIONAL/REJECTED → REMEDIATION) | ✅ Before using any status field |
| **[APPROVAL-BLOCK-TEMPLATE.md](APPROVAL-BLOCK-TEMPLATE.md)** | Reusable approval structure with 3 variants (YAML, Markdown table, JSON embed); ensures consistency across approval gates, reviews, sign-offs | ✅ When adding approval sections to templates |

**Key Benefit**: Enables automation, Jira sync, and prevents terminology chaos across documents.

---

## 📋 Phase 0: Assessment & Discovery

Used during client assessment to determine maturity and routing.

| Template | Purpose | Key Fields | Use When |
|----------|---------|-----------|----------|
| **prerequisites.template.yml** | Formal access & capabilities request | system access, environments, stakeholders | Starting new engagement |
| (AI-readiness report) | Maturity assessment (generated by orchestrator) | readiness_score, blockers, risks | After discovery phase |

**Output**: `/docs/assessment/`

---

## 📋 Phase 1-7: Documentation & PRD Generation

Used for requirements gathering, user research, and specification.

### Requirements & Product Definition

| Template | Purpose | Format | Use When |
|----------|---------|--------|----------|
| **prd.template.yml** | Master PRD with 8-stage pipeline | YAML | Consolidating requirements |
| **epic.template.yml** | Epic grouping multiple stories | YAML (Jira-compatible) | Planning feature epics |
| **user-story.template.yml** | Individual user story with BDD scenarios | YAML (Jira-compatible) | Defining user needs |
| **func-doc.template.yml** | Functional specification per feature | YAML | Detailed functional design |
| **user-story-draft-checklist.md** | Validation gate before story enters sprint | Markdown | Before story is "ready" |

**Output**: PDLC phase documents in `/docs/01-requirements/`, `/docs/02-architecture/`, `/docs/03-testing/`, `/docs/04-planning/`, and `/docs/05-implementation/user-stories.md`

### Meetings & Stakeholder Communication

| Template | Purpose | Format | Use When |
|----------|---------|--------|----------|
| **meeting.minutes.template.yml** | Meeting notes with decisions (bilingual FR/EN) | YAML | Every stakeholder meeting |

**Output**: `/docs/meetings/` (or as appendix to PRD)

---

## 📋 Phase 8: Implementation & TDD Cycles

Used during development when building features.

### Implementation Planning

| Template | Purpose | Format | Output |
|----------|---------|--------|--------|
| **implementation-plan.template.md** | Layer-by-layer architecture (4 layers max 500 words each) | Markdown | `/docs/05-implementation/epics/{EPIC-REF}/user-stories/{US-REF}/implementation-plan.md` |
| **layer-completion-checklist.template.md** | Per-layer validation & BDD assertion tracking | Markdown | `/docs/05-implementation/epics/{EPIC-REF}/user-stories/{US-REF}/layer-{N}-checklist.md` |
| **handoff.template.json** | Cycle snapshot with decisions, metrics, next steps | JSON | `/docs/05-implementation/epics/{EPIC-REF}/user-stories/{US-REF}/handoff.md` |
| **tdd-execution.template.md** | Append-only audit log of RED→GREEN→REFACTOR cycles | Markdown | `/docs/05-implementation/epics/{EPIC-REF}/user-stories/{US-REF}/tdd-execution.md` |

### Code Quality & Review

| Template | Purpose | Format | Output |
|----------|---------|--------|--------|
| **code-review-checklist.template.md** | 13-point review gates with CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM severity | Markdown | GitHub PR reviews |

### Status Tracking

| Template | Purpose | Format | Output |
|----------|---------|--------|--------|
| **user-stories-tracking.template.md** | SSOT implementation status by epic & story | Markdown | `/docs/05-implementation/user-stories.md` |
| **project-status.template.md** | Dashboard with KPIs, metrics, health indicators | Markdown | `/docs/project-status.md` |

---

## 📋 Operational Templates (Production)

**🆕 NEW - Priority 1 Enterprise Templates**

| Template | Purpose | Use When |
|----------|---------|----------|
| **executive-status-report.template.md** | C-level reporting (budget, timeline, risk, go/no-go) | Monthly exec steering meetings |
| **approval-gate.template.md** | Formal approval workflow with decision matrix | Design, code, security, compliance reviews |
| **change-management.template.md** | Change impact analysis, rollback procedures, comms | Before any production deployment |

**🆕 NEW - Priority 2 Operational Templates**

| Template | Purpose | Output |
|----------|---------|--------|
| **monitoring-setup.template.md** | Metrics, thresholds, alerts, on-call escalation | `/docs/05-implementation/epics/{EPIC-REF}/user-stories/{US-REF}/monitoring.md` |
| **compliance-checklist.template.md** | GDPR/SOC2/PCI-DSS validation with evidence | `/docs/compliance-checklist.md` |
| **incident-response.template.md** | Escalation procedures, post-mortems, RCAs | `/docs/incidents/incident-{ID}.md` |

**✅ COMPLETED - Priority 3 Operational Templates**

| Template | Purpose | Output |
|----------|---------|--------|
| **dependency-matrix.template.md** | Service dependencies, deployment ordering, cascade analysis | `/docs/05-implementation/epics/{EPIC-REF}/user-stories/{US-REF}/dependencies.md` |
| **performance-testing.template.md** | Load test scenarios, baselines, acceptance criteria | `/docs/05-implementation/epics/{EPIC-REF}/user-stories/{US-REF}/perf-plan.md` |
| **metadata-frontmatter-standard.md** | Standardized frontmatter for YAML/Markdown templates | `/docs/standards/metadata.md` (applies to all templates) |

---

## 📋 Planning & Coordination Templates

| Template | Purpose | Use When |
|----------|---------|----------|
| **sprint-planning.template.md** | Sprint scope, DOR/DOD, risk tracking | Sprint planning meetings |
| **recommendation-plan.template.md** | Options analysis (3 approaches with tradeoffs) | Strategy decisions |
| **project-status.template.md** | Metrics dashboard (velocity, bugs, coverage, timeline) | Status reporting |

---

## 📋 Specialized Templates

### Development Foundations

| Template | Purpose | Format |
|----------|---------|--------|
| **agent.template.yml** | AI agent system prompt definition | YAML |
| **tech-doc.template.yml** | Technical specification (architecture, components, data flow) | YAML |
| **api-specification.template.md** | OpenAPI/async API documentation | Markdown |

### Utility Templates

| Template | Purpose | Use When |
|----------|---------|----------|
| **user-story-folder.template.md** | Directory structure for story artifacts | Creating new `/docs/05-implementation/epics/{EPIC-REF}/user-stories/{US-REF}/` |

---

## 🔗 Template Relationships (Data Flow)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Phase 0: Assessment (prerequisites.template.yml)        │
└────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────┘
             │
             ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Phase 1-7: PRD (prd.template.yml)                        │
│   ├─ epic.template.yml                                  │
│   ├─ user-story.template.yml (with BDD scenarios)       │
│   ├─ func-doc.template.yml                              │
│   └─ meeting.minutes.template.yml                       │
└────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────┘
             │
             ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Phase 8: Implementation (user-stories.md as SSOT)       │
│   ├─ implementation-plan.template.md (frozen ref)       │
│   ├─ layer-completion-checklist.template.md (each)      │
│   ├─ handoff.template.json (overwritten per cycle)      │
│   ├─ tdd-execution.template.md (append-only)            │
│   ├─ code-review-checklist.template.md                  │
│   └─ project-status.template.md (updated daily)         │
└────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────┘
             │
             ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Production & Operations                                 │
│   ├─ approval-gate.template.md (Design/Code review)     │
│   ├─ change-management.template.md (Pre-deploy)         │
│   ├─ monitoring-setup.template.md (Day 1)               │
│   ├─ compliance-checklist.template.md (Audit)           │
│   ├─ incident-response.template.md (Issues)             │
│   └─ executive-status-report.template.md (Monthly)      │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

- **.md** (human-readable): 18 templates
- **.json** (handoff snapshots): 1 format

- **Phase 1-7**: 6 templates
- **Phase 8**: 8 templates
- **Operational**: 6 templates *(3 new, 3 planned)*
- **Cross-Phase**: 5 templates

---

## 🚀 Getting Started

### For New Projects
1. Use **prerequisites.template.yml** (Phase 0)
2. Copy **prd.template.yml** structure (Phase 1-7)
3. Reference **sprint-planning.template.md** (Team coordination)

### For Implementation Teams
1. Read **implementation-plan.template.md** (Dev-Lead creates this)
2. Track layers with **layer-completion-checklist.template.md** (TDD team)
3. Update **handoff.template.json** (After each cycle)
4. Measure progress with **project-status.template.md** (PM updates daily)

### For Production/Operations
1. Get **approval-gate.template.md** approval (Code review gate)
2. Plan deployment with **change-management.template.md**
3. Monitor with **monitoring-setup.template.md** (Day 1)
4. Handle incidents with **incident-response.template.md**
5. Report to execs with **executive-status-report.template.md** (Monthly)
